overrides.comment: Pool detail page has 4 pre-existing react-doctor warnings that predate the gate (giant component, useEffect-redirect, missing metadata, undestructured router/useSearchParams). Suppressing here so PRs touching the file (the diff gate scans changed files, not just changed lines) aren't blocked by debt that didn't grow with the change. Tracked in BACKLOG.md § 'Dashboard tech debt' for a focused refactor PR.
